name: pr_qx_churn_order
drl:
query AllOrds(long $a)
    Ord(amt == $a)
end
rule R when Ord(amt > 0) then end
_finding: Query row order UNDER CHURN (external review round 25): three facts, delete the middle, insert a fourth, then query. The reinserted fact lands at the HEAD of the row order (40, 10, 30) - not appended, not in the freed slot. The D-050 certified ordering made visible through the delete-middle-reinsert interleaving no prior query cell crossed (the query family had no epochs before round 20).
